Türkçe

Asst. Prof. Ebru Bilget Güven has received project support from TÜBİTAK ARDEB 1001 Program.

The project of our Molecular Biology and Genetics Department faculty member Assist. Prof. Dr. Ebru Bilget Güven, who received the (developable) score and resubmitted her revised project proposal in the 1st Term of 2024 of the TÜBİTAK ARDEB1001 program, has been awarded support.

Project title: “Repositioning of antibiofilm agents as anticancer drug candidates, investigation of their potential to break drug resistance in hepatocellular carcinoma cells and development of effective combinatorial treatments”.

In this case, the support rate for projects submitted by our university was 38% in the previous period, while it was 45.4% this period.

We congratulate our teacher Ebru and wish her success in her research.
